zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul II of Clermont於1245年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特時，他的父親Simon II de Clermont37歲，母親Adele de Monfort l'Amaury25歲。他於1268年與Alix de Dreux結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年7月11日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul II of Clermont于1245年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特时，他的父亲Simon II de Clermont37岁，母亲Adele de Monfort l'Amaury25岁。他于1268年与Alix de Dreux结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年7月11日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul II of Clermont was born in 1245, in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, his father, Simon II de Clermont, was 37 and his mother, Adele de Monfort l'Amaury, was 25. He married Alix de Dreux in 1268. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 11 July 1302, in Kortrijk, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul II of Clermont est né en 1245, à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Simon II de Clermont, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Adele de Monfort l'Amaury, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Dreux en 1268. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1302, à Kortrijk, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul II of Clermont 1245 in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon II de Clermont 37 und seine Mutter Adele de Monfort l'Amaury 25. Er hat 1268 Alix de Dreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juli 1302 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Kortrijk, West-Flandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul II of Clermont è nato il nel 1245 nel Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Simon II de Clermont, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Adele de Monfort l'Amaury, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Dreux nel 1268. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1302, nel Kortrijk, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul II of Clermontが1245年にフランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Simon II de Clermontは37歳，母Adele de Monfort l'Amauryは25歳であった。1268年にAlix de Dreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年7月11日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンコルトリジクで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul II of Clermont(이)가 1245년 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon II de Clermont(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Adele de Monfort l'Amaury(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1268년 Alix de Dreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 7월 11일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 코르트리제이크에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul II of Clermont nasceu em 1245, em Clermont, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Simon II de Clermont, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Monfort l'Amaury, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Dreux em 1268. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1302, em Kortrijk, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul II of Clermont родился в 1245 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon II de Clermont было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Monfort l'Amaury, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Dreux в 1268 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 11 июля 1302 г. в местности кортриджк, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul II of Clermont nació en 1245, en Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Simon II de Clermont, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Adele de Monfort l'Amaury, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alix de Dreux en 1268. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1302, en Kortrijk, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 57 años.
